case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. FILIBERTO POOL TUYUB

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT FILIBERTO POOL TUYUB IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,472.13 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TUYUB, FILIBERTO POOL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
